name: geo-chart
description: Map chart component for geographic data. Displays regions colored by value with optional visual map legend and tooltips.

data.name: data
data.description: Array of { name, value } for each region. Region names must match the map GeoJSON feature names. Example: [{name: 'United States', value: 500}, {name: 'China', value: 600}]

mapJson.name: mapJson
mapJson.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection for the map. Pass the map data to display.

mapName.name: mapName
mapName.description: Name used when registering the map. Default: 'world'

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 400

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 300

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance.

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Colors for the visual map scale. Example: ['#93c5fd', '#3b82f6']

showLegend.name: showLegend
showLegend.description: Whether to show the visual map (color scale) legend. Default: true

showHighlighter.name: showHighlighter
showHighlighter.description: Whether to emphasize the hovered region. Default: true

visualMapMin.name: visualMapMin
visualMapMin.description: Minimum value for the color scale. Auto-derived from data if not set.

visualMapMax.name: visualMapMax
visualMapMax.description: Maximum value for the color scale. Auto-derived from data if not set.
